heading: Overview
body:
Some Atlas features such as [federated database instances](atlas-data-federation) require access to resources in your Azure (Microsoft Azure)
Blob Storage environment. To grant access in a secure manner, create or
update an Azure (Microsoft Azure) [Service Principal](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/azure/create-azure-service-principal-azureps)
with access policy.
